quotes.text: You are not your thoughts. You are the sky, and thoughts are just clouds passing by.
Healing is not linear. Some days you will feel strong, and some days you will need rest. Both are okay.
Your feelings are valid, even when they don't make sense to anyone else.
Be gentle with yourself. You're doing the best you can.
It's okay to not be okay. It's okay to ask for help.
You don't have to be positive all the time. It's perfectly okay to feel sad, angry, annoyed, frustrated, scared, or anxious.
Breathe. You are enough. You have enough. You do enough.
The wound is the place where the light enters you.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.text: What you feel is valid. What you're going through is real.
Rest is not a reward. Rest is a right.
You are allowed to be both a masterpiece and a work in progress simultaneously.
Sometimes the bravest thing you can do is simply keep going.
Your pace is perfect. There is no race.
It's okay to outgrow people who don't grow with you.
You don't owe anyone your energy, your time, or your presence.
